sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41219" key="e)piswma/twsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισωμᾰ´τ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n41219.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">condensation into a mass,</tr_> Zos.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.107B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
